claims.summary: The 48D codec and entropy-gated tail lift expose texture as well as semantic projection.
claims.disposition: verify the dimension map, high-entropy lift, clamp provenance, and delivery-fidelity tests

claims.summary: Mode packing may coincide with repetitive dense vocabulary, but codec source alone cannot establish that lexical repetition caused producer pressure.
claims.disposition: verify pressure-source provenance and no-causality boundaries between Minime observation and bridge interpretation

claims.summary: Intentional and reactive narrative movement need separate evidence before concluding that four live dimensions are too coarse.
claims.disposition: verify narrative_arc_split_v1 and its sidecar-only, no-vector-write regressions

claims.summary: Expanding narrative arc to eight live dimensions would alter the 48D wire ABI and semantic transport.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work with protocol migration, captured-wire parity, replay, rollback, and felt review
